text:
CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Medicare Oncology Care Model Files — Clinical and Staging File
Version — May 2024
SAS name Label Type Length
BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
DOB Beneficiary Date of Birth DATE 8
SEX Beneficiary Sex NUM 3
EPSD_BGN_DT Episode Beginning Date DATE 8
EPSD_END_DT Episode Ending Date DATE 8
DOD Beneficiary Date of Death DATE 8
OCM_PRCTC_ID OCM-Assigned Practice ID CHAR 7
CNCR_TYPE_ASGNED OCM-Assigned Cancer Type CHAR 35
PRFMNC_PRD OCM
